caption: The video captures a live event celebrating the foundation day of the Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP). The scene is split into two frames: on the left, a prominent figure, likely a key party leader or politician, is seen addressing the audience. He is dressed in traditional attire with an orange and green scarf draped over his shoulders, standing against a backdrop adorned with the BJP logo. On the right, a large group of attendees, many wearing orange caps and scarves, are seated and attentively listening to the speech. Some are clapping and showing signs of engagement, indicating their support and enthusiasm for the event. The overall atmosphere is vibrant and celebratory, reflecting the significance of the occasion. The video also includes social media handles and a website link at the bottom, encouraging viewers to follow and engage with the BJP's online presence.
